items.question: What types of partnerships do you offer?
items.answer: We offer four partnership types: Affiliate Partners (earn commission on referrals), Strategic Partners (integrate Cashog into your platform), Technology Partners (build integrations and tools), and Enterprise Partners (large-scale custom partnerships). Choose the model that best fits your business.

items.question: How much commission can I earn?
items.answer: Commission rates vary by partnership type. Affiliate partners earn 30% recurring commission (up to 40% for high volume). Strategic partners can earn up to 50% revenue share. Enterprise partners receive custom commission structures based on volume and integration depth.

items.question: How do I get paid?
items.answer: We pay partners monthly via PayPal, bank transfer (ACH/SEPA), or cryptocurrency. Payments are processed on the 15th of each month for the previous month's earnings. Minimum payout is $100 for most partnership types (customizable for Enterprise partners).

items.question: Do you provide marketing materials?
items.answer: Yes! Affiliate and Strategic partners get access to banners, email templates, social media content, landing pages, and video assets. All materials are professionally designed and optimized for conversion.

items.question: What API access do you provide?
items.answer: Technology and Strategic partners get full REST API access including user verification, transaction tracking, commission reporting, and automated payouts. We provide comprehensive documentation and a sandbox environment for testing.

items.question: Can I white-label Cashog?
items.answer: Yes! Enterprise partners can white-label our solution under their own brand. This includes custom domain, branded interface, and co-branded marketing materials. Contact our partnership team for white-label requirements.

items.question: How long does partnership approval take?
items.answer: Most applications are reviewed within 2-3 business days. Strategic and Enterprise partnerships may take 5-7 business days for due diligence. Once approved, you'll be onboarded within 24 hours.

items.question: Is there a minimum commitment?
items.answer: No minimum commitment for Affiliate partners. Strategic and Technology partners have a 3-month minimum to allow for integration and testing. Enterprise partnerships have custom terms based on the agreement.

items.question: What support do partners receive?
items.answer: All partners receive email support. Strategic and Technology partners get dedicated account managers and priority support. Enterprise partners receive 24/7 dedicated support, monthly strategy sessions, and technical account management.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Click the 'Become a Partner' button above to fill out our partnership application. Our team will review your application and schedule an onboarding call to discuss the best partnership model for your business.
